critical.mandate: Stakeholder files are written to custom/stakeholders/ — never to _gaia/
The 50-file cap and 100-line limit are hard gates (FR-164)
Duplicate name detection is case-insensitive against the name frontmatter field (FR-157)

step.title: Ensure Directory Exists
step.action: Confirm directory is ready for writing

step.title: Collect Required Inputs
step.ask:
Provide the following required fields for the new stakeholder:
**Name** (display name, e.g., "Maria Santos"): **Role** (title/function, e.g., "Housekeeper Manager"): **Expertise** (domain skills, e.g., "Room turnover logistics"): **Personality** (traits, e.g., "Pragmatic, detail-oriented"):
step.check: HALT: All four fields (name, role, expertise, personality) are required. Please provide all values.

step.title: Collect Optional Inputs
step.ask:
Optionally provide these additional fields (press Enter to skip):
**Perspective** (viewpoint/biases, e.g., "Focuses on operational efficiency"): **Tags** (comma-separated, e.g., "operations, hospitality"):

step.title: Validate Against Cap and Duplicates
step.check: HALT: The 50-file cap has been reached in custom/stakeholders/ (FR-164). There are already {count} stakeholder files. Remove unused stakeholders before creating new ones.
step.action: Scan all existing stakeholder files in custom/stakeholders/*.md — read the name field from each file's YAML frontmatter
Compare each existing name against the new stakeholder name using case-insensitive comparison
step.check: HALT: A stakeholder with the name "{existing_name}" already exists at custom/stakeholders/{existing_file}. Name collision detected (case-insensitive). Choose a different name.

step.title: Generate Filename Slug
step.action: Convert the stakeholder name to a kebab-case slug: 1. Convert to lowercase 2. Replace spaces with hyphens 3. Strip all characters that are not alphanumeric or hyphens 4. Collapse multiple consecutive hyphens into a single hyphen 5. Trim leading/trailing hyphens 6. Append .md extension

check.if: file already exists at output path

step.check: HALT: File custom/stakeholders/{slug}.md already exists. This may indicate a slug collision from a different display name. Choose a different name or remove the existing file.

step.title: Generate and Write Stakeholder File
step.action:
Generate the stakeholder file with YAML frontmatter and Markdown body:
``` --- name: "{name}" role: "{role}" expertise: "{expertise}" personality: "{personality}" perspective: "{perspective}" # Only include if provided tags: [{tags_as_yaml_array}] # Only include if provided ---
## Background
{A 2-3 sentence description synthesized from the provided fields, describing this stakeholder's viewpoint and discussion style.} ```
Verify the generated file does not exceed 100 lines. If it does, trim the Background section to fit within the limit.
step.template-output: Stakeholder file with YAML frontmatter (name, role, expertise, personality, and optionally perspective and tags) plus a Markdown Background section.
